findings.title: [Freight] STUCK 6/15-17 run — RESOLVED 6/22: sprinter via Jeremy (FFE), PICKED UP, delivering to Brooklyn (Carriacou) WEDNESDAY 6/24
findings.detail: RESOLVED 6/22. The 6/15-17 run (3 measured pallets: BUF 52in/1,111 lb · GR 35in/713 lb · FO 59in/1,211 lb, ~3,035 lb) was the relief valve for critically-low inventory. Jeremy (FFE) sourced a reefer SPRINTER (~$4,000), PICKED UP 6/22, delivering to BROOKLYN — Carriacou Logistics (Scholes St; contact Mendez 347-248-7056, Curlon & Mohamed on dock) — WEDNESDAY 6/24. This is the S3/best-case outcome: lands in time for this week's store deliveries + UNFI (6/23-25) + Fancy Food (6/26-30). Why the sprinter premium was worth it: Edison was down to just BUF 22/FO 33/GR 15 (Lucy 6/22) and nothing in Brooklyn — Edison alone could NOT cover this week, so Wednesday delivery was the only option that lands product in time. ON ARRIVAL convert to inventory (location = Brooklyn/Carriacou) and tell Lucy which stops pull from Brooklyn vs Edison's remaining 70 cs. (owner: Kendall / Claude — log receipt at Brooklyn on Wed arrival; coordinate Localee pulls Edison vs Brooklyn)

SPECS NOW KNOWN (John, 6/19): 3 pallets — P1 48x40x54 1111lb, P2 48x40x35 713lb, P3 48x40x59 1211lb. So #pallets (3) + dims are answered; only the truck + date/time remain.
